inputs.titre: Début de la construction de la Tour de Pise

reason: The image depicts the early stages of construction of the Leaning Tower of Pisa. There are several elements that align with the time period such as stone construction, simple clothing, and rudimentary tools. However, the presence of the basilica with a large dome in the background is problematic as it doesn't seem to match the architecture of Pisa in 1173. Also, the men's clothing appears too modern.
